title: Create a "View As" Mode

posts.author: GimmeRope (Jason Keenan)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be super useful to have a “view as” mode.

Example: I have multiple boards with hidden columns and restricted columns. “Sign in” as one of your users to see how they view and could interact with the board.

It could also be used to debug dashboards that are based on hidden or restricted columns.

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be amazing - I am coming from a system that has a “Log In As” option and I am finding it very difficult to build my users boards without being able to test that the views are correct.

posts.author: Kelsey_Sylvester78 (Kelsey Sylvester)
posts.cookedHtml: I was just looking to do this today, hope it is implemented eventually!
